forgot.title: Reset Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgot.confirmMessage: We've sent a reset link to:
forgot.confirmInstructions: Click the link in the email to reset your password.
forgot.checkSpam: If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
forgot.linkExpires: The link will expire in 1 hour.

errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please wait {{seconds}} seconds.

reset.title: Set New Password
reset.subtitle: Enter the code you received via email
reset.passwordRequirements: Password must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number
reset.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset

errors.expiredCode: This code has expired. Please request a new code.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.notAvailable: User registration is not yet available. Please contact an administrator to create your account.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join the BATbern community

step2.title: Step 2 of 2: Review & Confirm
step2.termsLabel: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
step2.newsletterLabel: I want to receive event updates and newsletters (optional)
step2.verificationNotice: You will receive a confirmation email at {{email}}

register.success: Account created successfully! Please check your email.

errors.fullNameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters long
errors.fullNameTooLong: Name must be at most 100 characters long
errors.emailTooLong: Email must be at most 255 characters long
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 128 characters long
errors.passwordWeak: Password does not meet security requirements. Please ensure it has uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Service
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.signupFailed: Account creation failed. Please try again.
errors.usernameExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.

verify.title: Verify Your Email
verify.subtitle: We sent a verification code to:
verify.codeLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your email:
verify.expirationNotice: The verification code expires in 24 hours.
verify.checkSpam: If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
verify.successMessage: Your account is now active. Welcome to BATbern!
verify.redirecting: You will be automatically redirected in {{seconds}} seconds...

errors.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
errors.expiredCode: This code has expired. Click 'Resend' for a new one.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please wait 15 minutes or request a new code.
errors.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
errors.alreadyVerified: Your email is already verified. Redirecting to login...
errors.userNotFound: User not found. Please try registering again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many resend attempts. Please wait before trying again.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.emailNotVerified: Email not verified. Please check your inbox.
errors.accountLocked: Account locked. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
errors.unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
